import React from 'react';

/**
 * A helper component that provides a basic accessible page structure with common landmarks.
 * This component ensures that all content passed to it is contained within appropriate
 * ARIA landmarks, addressing the Axe violation: "region".
 * It also ensures that the page contains a level-one heading, addressing the Axe violation: "page-has-heading-one".
 *
 * It includes a header, navigation, main content area, and footer.
 *
